<user_query>
review website diagram and enhance based off BIQc current state as the diagram is outdated - i want to be able to communicate to visitors within 30 seconds what BIQc does and how it can hel their business 
</user_query>
I’ll quickly inspect the current website “How it works” implementation so I can propose a concrete upgrade plan aligned with BIQc’s live product flow and messaging.

I found the exact component on homepage (`IntelligenceDiagram`) and the newer consolidated messaging component (`HowItWorks`). Next I’m comparing both so the plan updates the diagram to reflect the live product narrative in a 30-second scan.

I have enough context to draft a focused implementation plan: refresh the homepage diagram into a faster “connect → monitor → decide → act” story, while keeping claims synced to live Platform/Intelligence messaging and improving mobile scan speed.

<attached_files>

<code_selection path="file:///c%3A/Users/andre/.cursor/plans/refresh_biqc_website_diagram_a0b55d57.plan.md" lines="1-82">
L1:---
L2:name: Refresh BIQc website diagram
L3:overview: Modernize the homepage “How it all works” diagram so visitors understand BIQc’s value in under 30 seconds, using current product narrative and claims already present across the site.
L4:todos:
L5:  - id: audit-copy
L6:    content: Map homepage diagram labels to current Platform/Intelligence messaging and identify outdated terms.
L7:    status: pending
L8:  - id: refactor-diagram-content
L9:    content: Update `IntelligenceDiagram` tiers, labels, and chips to communicate the 30-second BIQc story.
L10:    status: pending
L11:  - id: align-homepage-intro
L12:    content: Revise `HomePage` “How it all works” heading/subcopy to match the updated diagram flow.
L13:    status: pending
L14:  - id: validate-ux
L15:    content: Run responsive QA for scanability and consistency with existing website design system.
L16:    status: pending
L17:isProject: false
L18:---
L19:
L20:# Refresh Homepage BIQc Diagram
L21:
L22:## Goal
L23:
L24:Update the homepage architecture diagram to communicate BIQc’s current value proposition in a 30-second scan: **connect systems, monitor continuously, surface risks/opportunities, trigger guided/automated action**.
L25:
L26:## What will change
L27:
L28:- Replace outdated diagram copy and node labels in [frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js](frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js) with the current product language used in Platform/Intelligence pages.
L29:- Keep the existing visual style (dark/orange glow, animated connectors) but simplify cognitive load:
L30:  - fewer vendor badges in the primary layer,
L31:  - clearer stage labels,
L32:  - explicit business outcomes on the output side.
L33:- Update surrounding section message in [frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js](frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js) to match the new fast narrative and avoid duplicated/legacy phrasing.
L34:- Add mobile-first copy constraints (short labels, 1-line outcome phrases) so the diagram remains understandable without long reading.
L35:
L36:## Content alignment source of truth
L37:
L38:- Reuse messaging already validated in:
L39:  - [frontend/src/pages/website/PlatformPage.js](frontend/src/pages/website/PlatformPage.js)
L40:  - [frontend/src/pages/website/IntelligencePage.js](frontend/src/pages/website/IntelligencePage.js)
L41:  - [frontend/src/components/website/HowItWorks.js](frontend/src/components/website/HowItWorks.js)
L42:- Keep claims conservative and existing (no new quantitative promises).
L43:
L44:## Proposed new diagram narrative (30-second flow)
L45:
L46:```mermaid
L47:flowchart TD
L48:  systems[ConnectedSystems]
L49:  monitor[WatchtowerMonitoring]
L50:  engine[BIQcIntelligenceEngine]
L51:  actions[GuidedAndAutomatedActions]
L52:  outcomes[BusinessOutcomes]
L53:
L54:  systems -->|"Live sync"| monitor
L55:  monitor -->|"Cross-signal detection"| engine
L56:  engine -->|"Prioritised recommendations"| actions
L57:  actions -->|"Faster decisions, fewer surprises"| outcomes
L58:```
L59:
L60:
L61:
L62:## Implementation details
L63:
L64:- In `IntelligenceDiagram`:
L65:  - Update `SYSTEMS` categories to reflect current grouped inputs (Accounting/CRM/Ops/Comms style) with fewer but recognizable examples.
L66:  - Rename tiers to align with active narrative:
L67:    - `Connected Systems`
L68:    - `Watchtower Monitoring`
L69:    - `BIQc Intelligence Engine`
L70:    - `Decision Support & Auto-Action`
L71:  - Replace side labels around core from generic terms to business-relevant phrases (e.g., `Risks detected early`, `Recommended next best actions`).
L72:  - Refresh bottom row from logo wall emphasis to “key signal domains” chips (financial, revenue, operations, compliance, market, communication), reflecting current engine scope.
L73:- In `HomePage` heading/subtext above diagram:
L74:  - tighten copy to a single promise + single mechanism sentence for 30-second comprehension.
L75:
L76:## Verification plan
L77:
L78:- Visual QA on mobile and desktop for readability and hierarchy.
L79:- Confirm terminology consistency with Platform and Intelligence pages.
L80:- Check no regressions in section layout, spacing, and animations.
L81:
L82:
</code_selection>

</attached_files>
<user_query>
Refresh Homepage BIQc Diagram

Implement the plan as specified, it is attached for your reference. Do NOT edit the plan file itself.

To-do's from the plan have already been created. Do not create them again. Mark them as in_progress as you work, starting with the first one. Don't stop until you have completed all the to-dos.
</user_query>
I’m starting implementation now and will work through the to-dos in order, marking each one in progress/completed as I go while updating both diagram content and homepage copy.
I’ve already mapped the current homepage diagram against `PlatformPage`, `IntelligencePage`, and `HowItWorks`; next I’m applying the copy/schema refresh directly in the diagram component.
I’ve applied the diagram refactor and now I’m tightening the homepage section intro so the promise/mechanism are instantly clear before the visual flow.
I’ve finished the content updates; I’m now closing out validation with a quick code-level responsive pass and noting the local build blocker (`craco` missing) so you have exact next verify step.

Updated the homepage diagram flow to match BIQc’s current product story and optimize 30-second comprehension.

### What I changed

- Refreshed the diagram’s top-level narrative in `frontend/src/components/website/IntelligenceDiagram.js`:
  - `Business Signals` -> `Connected Systems`
  - `Watchtower` -> `Watchtower Monitoring`
  - Core framing -> `BIQc Intelligence Engine` with `Ingest Analyse Detect Act`
  - Final stage -> `Decision Support & Auto-Action`
- Replaced outdated system buckets with current, simpler grouped inputs:
  - `Accounting & Finance`, `Revenue & CRM`, `Operations & Comms`
- Updated side outcome callouts around the core to be business-result oriented:
  - Left: `Risks detected early`, `Blind spots reduced`
  - Right: `Next best actions recommended`, `Faster leadership decisions`
- Replaced vendor logo row with signal-domain chips aligned to current BIQc scope:
  - `Financial`, `Revenue`, `Operations`, `Compliance`, `Market`, `Communication`
- Tightened homepage intro copy in `frontend/src/pages/website/HomePage.js`:
  - Heading: `How BIQc works in 30 seconds`
  - Subcopy now communicates the full flow in one sentence (connect -> detect -> recommend -> decide).

### Validation status

- Completed a code-level responsive/layout pass for updated sections (`grid`, `sm:` behavior, text hierarchy).
- Tried running build validation, but local frontend build is currently blocked because `craco` is unavailable in this environment:
  - `npm run build` in `frontend` -> `'craco' is not recognized...`

If you want, I can do a second pass to make the diagram even more “scan-first” (e.g., shorten a couple of long sublabels for mobile and increase contrast on the domain chips).
